chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-618 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. 08.10.2025 Mr. Mansoor Hussain Larik, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner does not press the instant petition on the ground that grievance of petitioner has been resolved. Under instructions, instant petition is hereby dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
